mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 1 AND STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT BOARD_NO , CATEGORY_NAME AS CATEGORY , BOARD_TITLE , USER_ID , COUNT , CREATE_DATE FROM BOARD B JOIN CATEGORY USING (CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE B.STATUS = 'Y' AND BOARD_TYPE = 1 ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD B JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 1 AND B.STATUS = 'Y' AND
USER_ID
BOARD_TITLE
BOARD_CONTENT
LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT BOARD_NO , CATEGORY_NAME AS CATEGORY , BOARD_TITLE , USER_ID , COUNT , CREATE_DATE FROM BOARD B JOIN CATEGORY USING (CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 1 AND B.STATUS = 'Y' AND
USER_ID
BOARD_TITLE
BOARD_CONTENT
LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD(BOARD_NO , BOARD_TYPE , CATEGORY_NO , BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_CONTENT , BOARD_WRITER) VALUES(SEQ_BNO.NEXTVAL , 1 , #{category} , #{boardTitle} , #{boardContent} , #{boardWriter})
INSERT INTO ATTACHMENT(FILE_NO , REF_BNO , ORIGIN_NAME , CHANGE_NAME , FILE_PATH) VALUES(SEQ_FNO.NEXTVAL , SEQ_BNO.CURRVAL , #{originName} , #{changeName} , #{filePath})
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET COUNT = COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO , CATEGORY_NAME AS CATEGORY , BOARD_TITLE , USER_ID , CREATE_DATE , BOARD_CONTENT FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN CATEGORY USING (CATEGORY_NO) JOIN MEMBER ON (BOARD_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND B.STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT FILE_NO , ORIGIN_NAME , CHANGE_NAME , FILE_PATH FROM ATTACHMENT WHERE REF_BNO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY FILE_NO ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM CATEGORY ORDER BY CATEGORY_NO ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOARD(BOARD_NO , BOARD_TYPE , BOARD_TITLE , BOARD_CONTENT , BOARD_WRITER) VALUES(SEQ_BNO.NEXTVAL , 2 , #{boardTitle} , #{boardContent} , #{boardWriter})
INSERT INTO ATTACHMENT(FILE_NO , REF_BNO , ORIGIN_NAME , CHANGE_NAME , FILE_PATH , FILE_LEVEL) VALUES(SEQ_FNO.NEXTVAL , SEQ_BNO.CURRVAL , #{originName} , #{changeName} , #{filePath} , #{fileLevel})
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO , BOARD_TITLE , COUNT , FILE_PATH || CHANGE_NAME AS "TITLEIMG" FROM BOARD B JOIN ATTACHMENT ON (BOARD_NO = REF_BNO) WHERE BOARD_TYPE = 2 AND B.STATUS = 'Y' AND FILE_LEVEL = 1 ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPLY(REPLY_NO , REPLY_CONTENT , REF_BNO , REPLY_WRITER) VALUES(SEQ_RNO.NEXTVAL , #{replyContent} , #{refBoardNo} , #{replyWriter})
mapper.select: SELECT REPLY_NO , REPLY_CONTENT , USER_ID , TO_CHAR(CREATE_DATE, 'YY/MM/DD HH:MI:SS') "CREATE_DATE" FROM REPLY R JOIN MEMBER ON (REPLY_WRITER = USER_NO) WHERE REF_BNO = #{boardNo} AND R.STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY REPLY_NO DESC
